arts.ttl: Callum Wilson contract decision made at Newcastle United as striker returns to fitness
arts.sum: Either way, Howe feels that Wilson - who started the 2-0 defeat at Liverpool - can still do a job when fit. Now 33, Wilson has started just one Premier League match since last May after suffering a spate of injuries.

arts.ttl: Newcastle injury news: Eddie Howe issues latest Alexander Isak update before Brighton FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Newcastle United manager Eddie Howe delivers an update on the fitness of striker Alexander Isak ahead of Sunday's FA Cup fifth-round clash with Brighton & Hove Albion.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United have to play strongest possible side vs Brighton - despite one glaring weakness - John Gibson - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: We want better than 49 years ago when Newcastle United were the Nearly Men. They reached their first ever League Cup final in 1976 which was of course history making as well as the sixth round of the FA Cup, but unfortunately won neither. Not when United were without not just Isak but Joelinton and Sven Botman as well and remember the league cup showpiece is at Wembley, a neutral venue, and not Anfield.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer names the two players Newcastle United need to win Carabao Cup
arts.sum: The Newcastle legend said: "Eddie Howe is right not to risk key players ahead of the Carabao Cup final Alexander Isak was a notable miss from the team sheet against Liverpool, but I wouldn't be that concerned about his injury. Alan Shearer has highlighted the two players Newcastle United need fit and on form if they are to beat Liverpool in the Carabao Cup final.
